data.title: Tezos (XTZ) price rises by 4.33% to $0.79 on strong bullish signals from MACD and neutral RSI, indicating potential upside.
data.description: Tezos (XTZ) has experienced a significant increase in price, reaching $0.79. This surge is supported by a bullish MACD momentum and a neutral RSI position, indicating the potential for further upward movement.

data.title: QIA and QC to take over Qikiqtarjuaq Port dev. from GN, aiming for Inuit-led joint venture.93% owned by QC. Design phase to finish soon.
data.description: Iqaluit, Nunavut, September 18, 2025 - Today, the Qikiqtani Inuit Association (QIA) and Qikiqtaaluk Corporation (QC) revealed intentions to take charge of the development of a sea port in Qikiqtarjuaq through an Inuit-led joint venture. The initiative by QC will utilize existing design work done by the Government of Nunavut (GN) to hasten the construction of this vital infrastructure in Nunavut. The project design phase of the Qikiqtarjuaq port, being advanced by the GN, is projected to be concluded by this fall. The joint venture, to be predominantly owned and operated by QC in collaboration with infrastructure partners, seeks to enhance the port's development.
Putin, in the closed part of the meeting with the leaders of the Duma factions, gave a detailed report on the situation in the special military operation zone, Volodin reported

data.title: PBIRx in Milford, Conn. celebrates Clinical Team growth - Andrew Reis named Director of Clinical Consultants with 20+ years of experience.
data.description: Milford, Connecticut - PBIRx, Inc., a prominent company in pharmacy benefit consulting and auditing, has made notable advancements in its Clinical Operations team. Andrew Reis, RPh, MBA, has been appointed as the Director of Clinical Consultants. Andrew, with a robust background of over 20 years in pharmacy benefit management acquired from positions at OptumRx, Catamaran, and NMHCRx, brings extensive industry insight and leadership skills to his new role. This appointment marks a significant milestone for PBIRx, underscoring the company's commitment to enhancing its clinical operations.

data.title: ElevenLabs & AILAS team up for voice ID system protecting actors from AI misuse, ensuring voice authorization & responsible AI usage.
data.description: ElevenLabs has collaborated with AILAS to launch a new voice ID system. This innovative technology enables actors to authorize the use of their voices by artificial intelligence. The main objective is to prevent misuse of voice recordings and encourage responsible adoption of AI. This partnership aims to address these concerns by providing a secure authorization process for actors.

data.title: OM price at $0.22 holds support, gains 5.79%, with neutral RSI and bullish MACD, near $0.23 resistance.
data.description: The price of OM hovers around $0.22, showing a daily increase of 5.79%. The relative strength index (RSI) is neutral, while the moving average convergence divergence (MACD) indicates a bullish trend. It is edging closer to the important resistance level of $0.23 on the Bollinger Band.

data.title: Meta stock rises after launching new AI-powered Ray-Bans, sparking optimism on Wall Street for future growth in smart glasses market.
data.description: Analysts specializing in Meta stocks anticipate that the company will play a pivotal role in expanding the market for AI-powered smart glasses. The unveiling of new Ray-Bans by Meta has led to a rise in their stock, with Wall Street projecting a promising outlook for the future of AI glasses.

data.title: Novo Nordisk stock surges as oral Wegovy leads to "significant" weight loss for patients.
data.description: On Thursday, Novo Nordisk's stock experienced a notable surge following positive results from its oral version of Wegovy, which led to significant weight loss in patients. The success of this new treatment caused a boost in Novo Nordisk's shares.

data.title: Dogecoin and XRP ETFs see record trading volumes post SEC's new crypto listing standards, allowing quicker approvals.
data.description: Dogecoin (DOGE) and XRP are experiencing a surge in value as their ETFs debut alongside the SEC unveiling its guidelines for crypto exchange-traded products. Bitwise Chief Investment Officer, Matt Hougan, noted that these regulations could expedite approvals within 75 days, streamlining the current lengthy approval process. The key requirement is expected to be the inclusion of a regulated futures contract, potentially paving the way for ETFs based on Solana (SOL), Chainlink, and other cryptocurrencies. The full report is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: New Grayscale ETF for XRP, Solana and Cardano set for Wall Street launch after SEC approval, awaited by crypto investors.
data.description: A new Grayscale fund has been approved by the SEC to track the cryptocurrencies XRP, Solana, and Cardano. The fund is set to debut in the U.S. and has generated anticipation after receiving the long-awaited regulatory approval.

data.title: Veloz's 'The Way Forward is Electric' campaign reached millions with EV education messages, driving record engagement.
data.description: In Sacramento, California, Veloz, a national nonpartisan 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization, revealed that its Electric For All program, named 'The Way Forward is Electric', has already made a substantial impact. The initiative focuses on educating the public about electric vehicles (EVs) and has successfully reached hundreds of millions of consumers across the nation within just the initial two months of the year-long campaign. Starting on July 1, the effort commenced by highlighting the advantages of owning an EV, such as cost savings and lower emissions.

data.title: EigenLayer (EIGEN) price soars 26% to $1.93, RSI at 70.38 suggests overbought conditions, possible consolidation looming.
data.description: The price of EIGEN has surged by 25.91% to reach $1.93, while the Relative Strength Index (RSI) has reached 70.38, indicating significant bullish momentum. However, this could suggest an upcoming period of short-term consolidation for traders of EigenLayer.

data.title: Zazzle acquires Hobnob to offer complete event planning solution. Hobnob has helped millions organize events.
data.description: Menlo Park, California - Zazzle, a leading global platform for personalized design and products, has announced the acquisition of Hobnob, a popular mobile-first event planning app. This move is aimed at enhancing the event planning experience for users, particularly during festive seasons such as Halloween, Friendsgiving, winter weddings, and holiday gatherings. Hobnob, which has assisted millions in organizing various real-life events, allows hosts to effortlessly send invitations and manage RSVPs through its user-friendly interface. The partnership aims to make special moments unforgettable, building on Hobnob's success in streamlining event planning.

data.title: ETHFI climbs 10.38% to $1.64; RSI signals overbought at 70.05. Caution advised as it nears $1.68 resistance. Read more.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Ether.Fi (ETHFI) has surged to $1.64, supported by significant trading volume. However, caution is advised as the Relative Strength Index (RSI) sits at 70.05, indicating potential overbought conditions. The price is nearing a crucial resistance level at $1.68, suggesting a potential barrier to further upward movement.

data.title: Michael Saylor of MSTR calls Bitcoin 'digital capital,' predicts finance rebuild. Bitcoin treasury cos are starting, signaling shift in finance.
data.description: Michael Saylor, executive chairman of Strategy (NASDAQ: MSTR), has declared the commencement of "year one" for Bitcoin treasury companies, marking a new era in finance centered around "digital capital" and "digital intelligence." During the Bitcoin Treasuries Unconference, Saylor highlighted the significance of these companies in repurposing capital, likening it to how miners repurpose energy. He emphasized two key shifts: institutions are gradually showing interest in crypto after years of hesitancy, with the policy leaning towards Bitcoin, although Western banks are still adjusting their stance. This marks a significant transformation in the financial sector.

data.title: AIHA in FALLS CHURCH, Va. releases new streamlined second edition of Healthier Workplaces and Schools eBook to ensure health safety.
data.description: In a recent announcement from Falls Church, Virginia, AIHA, a prominent association dedicated to advancing occupational and environmental health and safety, launched a revised edition of its renowned Healthier Workplaces and Schools eBook for 2024. With an aim to support workplaces and educational institutions as they navigate the flu and cold season, this enhanced second edition offers streamlined and updated health protocols. AIHA's focus on safeguarding the well-being of individuals in the workplace and community underscores its commitment to maintaining occupational health standards. This initiative comes as employers and facilities are increasingly prioritizing measures to mitigate airborne infection risks.
